channel.title: Posts on irreconcilable
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on irreconcilable

item.title: i. the den of gifts
item.description:
by James Cody Phelan
edited by:

A clamor rang through the morning quiet. Gulls sprung from their roosts above drystone homes and squawked in protest, their days ruined. One squabble of birds drifted over to investigate the commotion and spied a human, only just passing through the dying Koumaria shrubs bundled at the northern edge of the village. The human labored, dragging anger behind him.

Down below, the Goodwoman Sonja knelt before an apricot sapling inspecting the plant for blight. She wiped smeary sweat from her eyes to get a clear look. One of the roots dangled limply but bore no mark of the dreaded rot. As she prepared to set the sapling in the earth, her attention snagged on the noise which had so bothered the seagulls. She left the promising tree, dusted off her dress, and poked her head out around the inlet of her garden wall in curiosity. Other women, stooped women with sun-crinkled faces, quit their sweeping to investigate the noise as well, their husbands and fathers and sons were out at sea, having left well before dawn for the morning catch. Sonja met the gaze of her neighbor across the path. They shared a moment, the two women, each raising a brow in concern before returning their attention up.

item.title: ii. asomething
item.description: TESTING TESTING TESTING. Is this thing on? Blogito ergo sume

item.title: iii. do aliens dream of football
item.description: You notice the colors first. Tangerine orange against lapis; vermillion against daisy yellow. The shades enwrap each man and his carapace of beetle-like armor as he enters the field of green. Supervisory figures wears stripes of [GH(1.1]zebra hide, their greyscale in obvious distinction to abundant polychrome. At either edge of the field, beyond the painted hectares[GH(2.1], stand neon-yellow metal tongs bifurcated to the sky[GH(3.1], as the sky rests bluer than the day it was born[GH(4.1]. The colors twist and fold, over and behind as men jockey across the constructed terrain. There they smash, sprinting, into their opposite partner, their colors overlaid in a competition of visual noise you cannot ignore. It is fabulous.[GH(5.1]

item.title: vii. the demiurge
item.description:
The Demiurge

A tragedy in two acts

James Cody Phelan

Dramatis Personae (Pleromata)

  • The Unbegotten
  • Barbelo: [Thought]. Meek chairs of the Pleromata.
  • Nous: [Thinking]. Harsh overseers of the Aeons.
  • Geradamas: Sly assistants to Nous.
  • Sophia: [Thinking of Thought]. Processors of the Together-work.
  • Armzoral: The Committee on [Truth].
  • Oriel: The Committee on [Memory].
  • Daviethai: The Committee on [Passion].
  • Yaldabaoth: [The Demiurge].

ϘϘϘ

{ACT I: The Pleromata Begins}

The Pleromatic crankshaft whirs its Aeons into being. They had been, were being, are. And spin again, again through a gritted infinity. Aeons, attributes of perfect flesh, turned about a flywheel by the thing that is higher. Creation—fueled by an entity to become an entity. Matter drips into the cosmic factory, stretched thin and taut, then wound into patterned geometry as starflesh yanked into positionality, attentive to the nothingness beyond the somethingness.
